ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "tx_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the transaction */,
  "tx_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., send, receive) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., confirmed, pending) */,
  "chain" TEXT /* Blockchain chain (e.g., ethereum, bitcoin) */,
  "buy_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in the buy currency */,
  "buy_currency" TEXT /* Buy currency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "buy_currency_address" TEXT /* Address of the buy currency */,
  "buy_fiat_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in the buy fiat currency */,
  "buy_fiat_currency" TEXT /* Buy fiat currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "sell_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in the sell currency */,
  "sell_currency" TEXT /* Sell currency (e.g., ETH, BTC) */,
  "sell_currency_address" TEXT /* Address of the sell currency */,
  "sell_fiat_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction in the sell fiat currency */,
  "sell_fiat_currency" TEXT /* Sell fiat currency (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction fee */,
  "fee_currency" TEXT /* Currency of the transaction fee */,
  "fee_fiat_amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction fee in fiat currency */,
  "fee_fiat_currency" TEXT /* Fiat currency of the transaction fee */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the transaction on the blockchain explorer */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number in which the transaction was included */,
  "gas_limit" INTEGER /* Gas limit set for the transaction */,
  "gas_used" INTEGER /* Actual gas used by the transaction */,
  "nonce" INTEGER /* Nonce of the transaction */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags to categorize the transaction */,
  "confirmed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was confirmed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tx_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incoming_transfers" (
  "it_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incoming transfer */,
  "tx_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that this transfer belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being transferred */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset being transferred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset being transferred */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Address of the sender */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number of the transfer */,
  "log_index" INTEGER /* Log index of the transfer event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("it_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incoming_transfers_tx_id FOREIGN KEY ("tx_id") REFERENCES transactions ("tx_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incoming_transfers_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outgoing_transfers" (
  "ot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outgoing transfer */,
  "tx_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction that this transfer belongs to */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being transferred */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the asset being transferred */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the asset being transferred */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Address of the recipient */,
  "tx_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  "block_number" INTEGER /* Block number of the transfer */,
  "log_index" INTEGER /* Log index of the transfer event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outgoing_transfers_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outgoing_transfers_tx_id FOREIGN KEY ("tx_id") REFERENCES transactions ("tx_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_code" TEXT /* Code of the asset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the asset */,
  "decimals" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the asset */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the asset's icon */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the asset (e.g., token, coin) */,
  "total_supply" REAL /* Total supply of the asset */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id")
)
